title: London Hospital Worker Tried to Sell Princess Catherine’s Medical Records, Reports Say
summary_full: Britain’s data regulator said it had reprimanded a health worker for misusing sensitive information. The hospital said the person no longer worked there.
summary_public: Britain’s data regulator said it had reprimanded a health worker for misusing sensitive information. The hospital said the person no longer worked there.
